terms.definition: A cross-language package and environment manager that installs Python and non-Python (compiled) dependencies into isolated environments.
A YAML file declaring a conda environment's name, channels and dependencies for reproducible recreation.
A repository conda installs packages from; conda-forge is the main community channel.
A large, community-maintained conda channel providing up-to-date prebuilt packages.
A minimal installer that provides conda without the full Anaconda package bundle.
